body.promoDescription: Enjoy exclusive travel discounts with our special offers and fares.
body.title: Exclusive Deals with Our Partners

fieldValues.title: MID YEAR ESCAPE
fieldValues.description: Enjoy special fares to exciting destinations across Asia, Australia and Europe.

fieldValues.title: Experience Europe Anew to Amsterdam
fieldValues.description: Starting 1 July 2026, celebrate the launch of our new direct flight from Bangkok to Amsterdam and enjoy special promotional fares.

fieldValues.title: 158th IATA Slot Conference
fieldValues.description: The Global Aviation Community Meets in Bangkok from 9–11 June 2026. Whether travelling from across Asia, Europe, Australia, or regional destinations.

fieldValues.title: NEW CHECKED BAGGAGE PIECE CONCEPT

fieldValues.imageAlt: Discover the all-new THAI mobile app experience.
fieldValues.title: Discover the all-new THAI mobile app experience
fieldValues.description: Download your mobile app today at App Store, Google Play Store and Huawei AppGallery and get a good start to every journey with THAI. Smooth as silk.

fieldValues.title: Cash Plus Miles
fieldValues.description: Purchase THAI tickets with cash and miles

fieldValues.imageAlt: ELIGIBLE TICKET FARE FOR ROYAL ORCHID PLUS PLATINUM AND GOLD UPGRADE
fieldValues.title: ELIGIBLE TICKET FARE FOR ROYAL ORCHID PLUS PLATINUM AND GOLD UPGRADE
fieldValues.description: Royal Orchid Plus Platinum and Gold members, who are entitled for Complimentary Upgrades, may use their upgrades together with THAI tickets under the conditions.

fieldValues.title: SENIOR FARE
fieldValues.description: THAI is ready to fly senior travelling domestic flight with special offers.

fieldValues.title: Religious Fare
fieldValues.description: THAI offers special fare for Religious travelers travelling to fascinating destinations around the world.

fieldValues.imageAlt: Good Taste for a Good Cause
fieldValues.title: Good Taste for a Good Cause
fieldValues.description: Thai Airways International, in collaboration with local Thai producers, is proud to present “Good Taste for a Good Cause” an initiative that celebrates onboard culinary excellence with an exclusive selection of sustainable and socially responsible products.

fieldValues.title: Co-Promotion with ShopeePay
fieldValues.description: Apply code to get discount when paying with SPayLater

fieldValues.imageAlt: Discover Hong Kong with KTC credit card
fieldValues.title: Discover Hong Kong with KTC credit card
fieldValues.description: Get 500 THB discount when booking THAI tickets round-trip flights to Hong Kong.

fieldValues.title: Discover Korea with KTC credit card
fieldValues.description: Get 1,000 THB discount per ticket for round-trip flights to Korea.

fieldValues.title: Discover Asia and Europe with THAI and pay with KTC Mastercard
fieldValues.description: Get 1,000 THB discount when booking THAI tickets round-trip flights to Asia and Europe.

fieldValues.title: EXCLUSIVELY FOR KBank credit card
fieldValues.description: Pay KBank Smart PAY 0% installment plan to 10 months. Get cashback up to THB 16,800*.

fieldValues.title: Co-Promotion with Krungsri Consumer
fieldValues.description: Fly with Thai Airways, Get Cash Back up to 20,000 Baht*

fieldValues.title: Co-Promotion with Krungsri Consumer (0% Installment)
fieldValues.description: ENJOY 0% up to 10 months when purchasing Thai Airways tickets.

fieldValues.imageAlt: Co-Promotion with UOB Credit Card & TMRW Credit Card
fieldValues.title: Co-Promotion with UOB Credit Card & TMRW Credit Card
fieldValues.description: EXCLUSIVELY FOR UOB Credit Card & TMRW Credit Card. ENJOY UOB i-Plan 0% up to 10 months with Cash back up to 10,000 THB

fieldValues.title: Co-Promotion with ttb
fieldValues.description: Get cash back up to 8,400 Baht

fieldValues.title: KTC Fly Forever
fieldValues.description: Redeem KTC FOREVER points for 15% cashback. When spending with KTC credit card and redeem KTC FOREVER points in the amount equivalent to the payment per sales slip.

fieldValues.title: Co-Promotion with CardX/SCB  (0% 10 Months)
fieldValues.description: Fly worldwide with 0% Installments for Up to 10 Months! Enjoy exclusive privileges for CardX and SCB credit cardholders when purchasing Thai Airways tickets in Thai Baht.

fieldValues.imageAlt: Fly Smooth, Ride Smart with Thai Airways and Grab
fieldValues.title: Fly Smooth, Ride Smart with Thai Airways and Grab
fieldValues.description: Get up to 30% Off. Complete your journey with Thai Airways and Grab. Enjoy exclusive discounts on GrabCar for airport pick-ups and drop-offs at Noi Bai (HAN) and Tan Son Nhat (SGN).

fieldValues.title: THAI AIRWAYS X SENTOSA
fieldValues.description: Exclusive Complimentary Attraction Offer. Elevate Your Journey with a Special Sentosa Experience.

fieldValues.title: Elevate Your Magical Journey Experience
fieldValues.description: Your Thai Airways Boarding Pass – A Passport to Exclusive Privileges

fieldValues.title: Installment plan up to 10 months

fieldValues.imageAlt: Exclusive self-Drive Rental Discount Up to 40% off
fieldValues.title: Exclusive self-Drive Rental Discount Up to 40% off
fieldValues.description: Get up to 40% discount, + get special valued package (SCDW-TP-PAI) when book and pay in advance with PROMO CODE: AVISTG66

fieldValues.title: 50% Miles Back on Award Flights between Bangkok and Amsterdam
fieldValues.description: Redeem miles for award tickets on THAI from / to Amsterdam, receive 50% miles back

fieldValues.imageAlt: Update Your Profile and Earn 330 Bonus Miles
fieldValues.title: Update Your Profile and Earn 330 Bonus Miles
fieldValues.description: Keep your Royal Orchid Plus profile up to date and stay effortlessly connected to the latest news, exclusive offers, and member privileges. Simply update your contact details online to receive 330 bonus miles.

fieldValues.imageAlt: Special Offers from Hertz: Up to 2,000 Royal Orchid Plus Miles and 10% Off
fieldValues.title: Special Offers from Hertz: Up to 2,000 Royal Orchid Plus Miles and 10% Off
fieldValues.description: From now until 30 June 2026, Royal Orchid Plus members who book a car for pickup by 30 June 2026 at participating Hertz locations in USA, Canada, Australia, New Zealand or Asia^ can enjoy up to 2,000 Royal Orchid Plus miles and 10% off.

fieldValues.title: Earn 1,000 Miles from CentaraThe1 and Travel with Confidence
fieldValues.description: Book 3 or more consecutive nights and receive 1,000 Royal Orchid Plus miles, along with exclusive CentaraThe1 member benefits.

fieldValues.title: Exclusive AVIS Airport Transfer Rates for THAI Passengers
fieldValues.description: Enjoy the best deals on airport transfer service with the executive EV van, MG Maxus 9 (one-way or round trip) between Suvarnabhumi Airport and Bangkok downtown.

fieldValues.imageAlt: 66 Years of Thai Airways — A Journey from the Heart
fieldValues.title: 66 Years of Thai Airways — A Journey from the Heart
fieldValues.description: Royal Orchid Plus members who purchase concert tickets will receive 660 bonus miles and a chance to win Thai Airways tickets.

fieldValues.title: Receive a THB 15,000 discount voucher from Anantara Vacation Club
fieldValues.description: Exclusive Privilege for Royal Orchid Plus Members

fieldValues.title: Turn CARAT into Royal Orchid Plus Miles – Now Possible!

fieldValues.title: Complimentary In-Flight Wi-Fi Service on THAI

fieldValues.title: Special VIP Movie Ticket Discount at THAI Smooth as Silk Premier Cinema
